title: Can't set dependencies
excerpt:
I can’t seem to set any dependencies. I’ve set dates and tied the dependency column to date column. I’ve watched the monday video on dependencies, read the article, searched the community and sent a message to helpdesk.

posts.author: Kathy_KNR (Kathy Cook)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t seem to set any dependencies. I’ve set dates and tied the dependency column to date column. I’ve watched the monday video on dependencies, read the article, searched the community and sent a message to helpdesk.
Maybe you might have insight for me. Thanks in advance.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Kathy_KNR! Hopefully you got a helpful response to your help-desk email! If you have any further questions please let us know at support@monday.com
